evals.prompt: Create a slideshow video from the photos in /Users/samli/dev/photo-slideshow-skill/test_photos. Save it to /Users/samli/dev/photo-slideshow-skill/photo-slideshow-workspace/iteration-1/eval-0/output/slideshow.mp4
evals.expected_output: A working 4K MP4 video file containing all 12 photos, each centred on a warm white matt background with even padding, displayed for 5 seconds each with crossfade transitions.

assertions.text: An MP4 file is produced at the specified output path
The output file is a valid video (non-zero file size > 1MB)
The script processes all 12 test photos (output duration ≥ 55 seconds)
Dependencies (FFmpeg, Pillow) are checked before running

evals.prompt: Make a slideshow from my photos at /Users/samli/dev/photo-slideshow-skill/test_photos — I want a light grey background instead of white, and 8 seconds per photo. Output to /Users/samli/dev/photo-slideshow-skill/photo-slideshow-workspace/iteration-1/eval-1/output/grey-slideshow.mp4
evals.expected_output: A working MP4 video with a light grey matt (#E8E8E8 or similar), 8-second slides, and all photos properly oriented and centred.

assertions.text: An MP4 file is produced at the specified output path
The script uses a grey matt colour (not the default warm white) — visible in the MATT_COLOUR config
SLIDE_SECS is set to 8.0 in the generated script

evals.prompt: Quick 1080p preview slideshow from /Users/samli/dev/photo-slideshow-skill/test_photos, 3 seconds per photo, no crossfade. Save to /Users/samli/dev/photo-slideshow-skill/photo-slideshow-workspace/iteration-1/eval-2/output/preview.mp4
evals.expected_output: A 1920×1080 MP4 video with 3-second hard-cut slides and default warm white matt.

assertions.text: An MP4 file is produced at the specified output path
FRAME_W=1920 and FRAME_H=1080 are set in the generated script
FADE_SECS=0 (hard cut, no crossfade) is set in the generated script
SLIDE_SECS=3.0 is set in the generated script

evals.prompt: Create a slideshow from /Users/samli/dev/photo-slideshow-skill/test_photos with background music from /Users/samli/dev/photo-slideshow-skill/test_audio/track.mp3. Save to /Users/samli/dev/photo-slideshow-skill/photo-slideshow-workspace/iteration-1/eval-3/output/slideshow-with-audio.mp4
evals.expected_output: A 4K MP4 video with all photos and the MP3 file looped as background audio, trimmed to match the video duration.

assertions.text: An MP4 file is produced at the specified output path
AUDIO_FILES contains the provided MP3 path in the generated script
The generated script uses ffprobe to get audio duration and builds an audio concat+trim filter
